texto: I remember Simon O'Donnell being struck with cancer during Australia's 1987 World Cup campaign. I know very well what it is like to have a teammate who has been struck with a potentially fatal disease. He fought through: managed to get himself back to 100% fitness and back to playing again.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tom Moody: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “I remember Simon O'Donnell being struck with cancer during Australia's 1987 World Cup campaign. I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, world, remember pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de academia e remember.

frase_original: I remember Simon O'Donnell being struck with cancer during Australia's 1987 World Cup campaign. I know very well what it is like to have a teammate who has been struck with a potentially fatal disease. He fought through: managed to get himself back to 100% fitness and back to playing again.
